name: Plantain, The Kiss-loving Plant
description:
Smooch... Smooch... Smooch...

An endless loop of pleasure.

[Very NSFW, Potential Rape, Pheromones]

Description Provided By [REDACTED].

The Plantain is a plant-like creature, with large pink lips, a purple head, a lighter purple body, yellow leaf-like arms, and two yellow leaves on the back of its head.

The creature also has human-like female genitalia, breasts, and overall body.

The Plantain's main ability is its sexually stimulating kisses. The creature's kisses leave pink kiss marks, that disappear after a few moments, though repeated kisses will leave more lasting marks. These kisses can be both direct, and 'blown', giving sexually stimulating effects, usually directed towards the face, and genitals.

Plantains also may travel in groups, where they find someone, usually a male, and all collectively pounce, and stimulate them into submission. Plantains prefer oral sex, but may perform any kind.

This species is highly sexually dominant, but occasionally more submissive ones can be found. Some individuals have domesticated these creatures into their own pets, serving physical, emotional, and sexual needs.

We do not advise anyone attempt to domesticate this species.

Overall Classification

Creature Class: Plantfolk

Threat Level: 4B

(Quite capable, Very likely)

Avoiding this creature is highly advised, and any sightings should be reported immediately.
